[35m@@ -111,82 +119,82 @@[m [mThe following privileges are available in Materialize:[m
 [m
 | Command | Privileges |[m
 | --- | --- |[m
[31m-| &lt;a href="/sql/alter-cluster" &gt;&lt;code&gt;ALTER CLUSTER&lt;/code&gt;&lt;/a&gt; | &lt;ul&gt; &lt;li&gt; &lt;p&gt;Ownership of the cluster.&lt;/p&gt; &lt;/li&gt; &lt;li&gt; &lt;p&gt;To rename a cluster, you must also have membership in the &lt;code&gt;&amp;lt;new_owner_role&amp;gt;&lt;/code&gt;.&lt;/p&gt; &lt;/li&gt; &lt;li&gt; &lt;p&gt;To swap names with another cluster, you must also have ownership of the other cluster.&lt;/p&gt; &lt;/li&gt; &lt;/ul&gt;  |[m
[31m-| &lt;a href="/sql/alter-cluster-replica" &gt;&lt;code&gt;ALTER CLUSTER REPLICA&lt;/code&gt;&lt;/a&gt; | &lt;ul&gt; &lt;li&gt;Ownership of the cluster replica.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;li&gt;In addition, to change owners: &lt;ul&gt; &lt;li&gt;Role membership in &lt;code&gt;new_owner&lt;/code&gt;.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;li&gt;&lt;code&gt;CREATE&lt;/code&gt; privileges on the containing cluster.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;/ul&gt; &lt;/li&gt; &lt;/ul&gt;  |[m
[31m-| &lt;a href="/sql/alter-connection" &gt;&lt;code&gt;ALTER CONNECTION&lt;/code&gt;&lt;/a&gt; | &lt;ul&gt; &lt;li&gt;Ownership of the connection.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;li&gt;In addition, to change owners: &lt;ul&gt; &lt;li&gt;Role membership in &lt;code&gt;new_owner&lt;/code&gt;.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;li&gt;&lt;code&gt;CREATE&lt;/code&gt; privileges on the containing schema if the connection is namespaced by a schema.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;/ul&gt; &lt;/li&gt; &lt;/ul&gt;  |[m
[31m-| &lt;a href="/sql/alter-database" &gt;&lt;code&gt;ALTER DATABASE&lt;/code&gt;&lt;/a&gt; | &lt;ul&gt; &lt;li&gt;Ownership of the database.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;li&gt;In addition, to change owners: &lt;ul&gt; &lt;li&gt;Role membership in &lt;code&gt;new_owner&lt;/code&gt;.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;/ul&gt; &lt;/li&gt; &lt;/ul&gt;  |[m
[31m-| &lt;a href="/sql/alter-default-privileges" &gt;&lt;code&gt;ALTER DEFAULT PRIVILEGES&lt;/code&gt;&lt;/a&gt; | &lt;ul&gt; &lt;li&gt;Role membership in &lt;code&gt;role_name&lt;/code&gt;.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;li&gt;&lt;code&gt;USAGE&lt;/code&gt; privileges on the containing database if &lt;code&gt;database_name&lt;/code&gt; is specified.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;li&gt;&lt;code&gt;USAGE&lt;/code&gt; privileges on the containing schema if &lt;code&gt;schema_name&lt;/code&gt; is specified.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;li&gt;&lt;em&gt;superuser&lt;/em&gt; status if the &lt;em&gt;target_role&lt;/em&gt; is &lt;code&gt;PUBLIC&lt;/code&gt; or &lt;strong&gt;ALL ROLES&lt;/strong&gt; is specified.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;/ul&gt;  |[m
[31m-| &lt;a href="/sql/alter-index" &gt;&lt;code&gt;ALTER INDEX&lt;/code&gt;&lt;/a&gt; | &lt;ul&gt; &lt;li&gt;Ownership of the index.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;/ul&gt;  |[m
[31m-| &lt;a href="/sql/alter-materialized-view" &gt;&lt;code&gt;ALTER MATERIALIZED VIEW&lt;/code&gt;&lt;/a&gt; | &lt;ul&gt; &lt;li&gt;Ownership of the materialized view.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;li&gt;In addition, to change owners: &lt;ul&gt; &lt;li&gt;Role membership in &lt;code&gt;new_owner&lt;/code&gt;.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;li&gt;&lt;code&gt;CREATE&lt;/code&gt; privileges on the containing schema if the materialized view is namespaced by a schema.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;/ul&gt; &lt;/li&gt; &lt;/ul&gt;  |[m
[31m-| &lt;a href="/sql/alter-network-policy" &gt;&lt;code&gt;ALTER NETWORK POLICY&lt;/code&gt;&lt;/a&gt; | &lt;ul&gt; &lt;li&gt;Ownership of the network policy.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;/ul&gt;  |[m
[31m-| &lt;a href="/sql/alter-role" &gt;&lt;code&gt;ALTER ROLE&lt;/code&gt;&lt;/a&gt; | &lt;ul&gt; &lt;li&gt;&lt;code&gt;CREATEROLE&lt;/code&gt; privileges on the system.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;/ul&gt;  |[m
[31m-| &lt;a href="/sql/alter-schema" &gt;&lt;code&gt;ALTER SCHEMA&lt;/code&gt;&lt;/a&gt; | &lt;ul&gt; &lt;li&gt;Ownership of the schema.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;li&gt;In addition, &lt;ul&gt; &lt;li&gt;To swap with another schema: &lt;ul&gt; &lt;li&gt;Ownership of the other schema&lt;/li&gt; &lt;/ul&gt; &lt;/li&gt; &lt;li&gt;To change owners: &lt;ul&gt; &lt;li&gt;Role membership in &lt;code&gt;new_owner&lt;/code&gt;.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;li&gt;&lt;code&gt;CREATE&lt;/code&gt; privileges on the containing database.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;/ul&gt; &lt;/li&gt; &lt;/ul&gt; &lt;/li&gt; &lt;/ul&gt;  |[m
[31m-| &lt;a href="/sql/alter-secret" &gt;&lt;code&gt;ALTER SECRET&lt;/code&gt;&lt;/a&gt; | &lt;ul&gt; &lt;li&gt;Ownership of the secret being altered.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;li&gt;In addition, to change owners: &lt;ul&gt; &lt;li&gt;Role membership in &lt;code&gt;new_owner&lt;/code&gt;.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;li&gt;&lt;code&gt;CREATE&lt;/code&gt; privileges on the containing schema if the secret is namespaced by a schema.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;/ul&gt; &lt;/li&gt; &lt;/ul&gt;  |[m
[31m-| &lt;a href="/sql/alter-sink" &gt;&lt;code&gt;ALTER SINK&lt;/code&gt;&lt;/a&gt; | &lt;ul&gt; &lt;li&gt;Ownership of the sink being altered.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;li&gt;In addition, &lt;ul&gt; &lt;li&gt;To change the sink from relation: &lt;ul&gt; &lt;li&gt;&lt;code&gt;SELECT&lt;/code&gt; privileges on the new relation being written out to an external system.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;li&gt;&lt;code&gt;CREATE&lt;/code&gt; privileges on the cluster maintaining the sink.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;li&gt;&lt;code&gt;USAGE&lt;/code&gt; privileges on all connections and secrets used in the sink definition.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;li&gt;&lt;code&gt;USAGE&lt;/code&gt; privileges on the schemas that all connections and secrets in the statement are contained in.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;/ul&gt; &lt;/li&gt; &lt;li&gt;To change owners: &lt;ul&gt; &lt;li&gt;Role membership in &lt;code&gt;new_owner&lt;/code&gt;.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;li&gt;&lt;code&gt;CREATE&lt;/code&gt; privileges on the containing schema if the sink is namespaced by a schema.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;/ul&gt; &lt;/li&gt; &lt;/ul&gt; &lt;/li&gt; &lt;/ul&gt;  |[m
[31m-| &lt;a href="/sql/alter-source" &gt;&lt;code&gt;ALTER SOURCE&lt;/code&gt;&lt;/a&gt; | &lt;ul&gt; &lt;li&gt;Ownership of the source being altered.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;li&gt;In addition, to change owners: &lt;ul&gt; &lt;li&gt;Role membership in &lt;code&gt;new_owner&lt;/code&gt;.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;li&gt;&lt;code&gt;CREATE&lt;/code&gt; privileges on the containing schema if the source is namespaced by a schema.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;/ul&gt; &lt;/li&gt; &lt;/ul&gt;  |[m
[31m-| &lt;a href="/sql/alter-system-reset" &gt;&lt;code&gt;ALTER SYSTEM RESET&lt;/code&gt;&lt;/a&gt; | &lt;ul&gt; &lt;li&gt;&lt;a href="/security/cloud/users-service-accounts/#organization-roles" &gt;&lt;em&gt;Superuser&lt;/em&gt; privileges&lt;/a&gt;&lt;/li&gt; &lt;/ul&gt;  |[m
[31m-| &lt;a href="/sql/alter-system-set" &gt;&lt;code&gt;ALTER SYSTEM SET&lt;/code&gt;&lt;/a&gt; | &lt;ul&gt; &lt;li&gt;&lt;a href="/security/cloud/users-service-accounts/#organization-roles" &gt;&lt;em&gt;Superuser&lt;/em&gt; privileges&lt;/a&gt;&lt;/li&gt; &lt;/ul&gt;  |[m
[31m-| &lt;a href="/sql/alter-table" &gt;&lt;code&gt;ALTER TABLE&lt;/code&gt;&lt;/a&gt; | &lt;ul&gt; &lt;li&gt;Ownership of the table being altered.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;li&gt;In addition, to change owners: &lt;ul&gt; &lt;li&gt;Role membership in &lt;code&gt;new_owner&lt;/code&gt;.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;li&gt;&lt;code&gt;CREATE&lt;/code&gt; privileges on the containing schema if the table is namespaced by a schema.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;/ul&gt; &lt;/li&gt; &lt;/ul&gt;  |[m
[31m-| &lt;a href="/sql/alter-type" &gt;&lt;code&gt;ALTER TYPE&lt;/code&gt;&lt;/a&gt; | &lt;ul&gt; &lt;li&gt;Ownership of the type being altered.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;li&gt;In addition, to change owners: &lt;ul&gt; &lt;li&gt;Role membership in &lt;code&gt;new_owner&lt;/code&gt;.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;li&gt;&lt;code&gt;CREATE&lt;/code&gt; privileges on the containing schema if the type is namespaced by a schema.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;/ul&gt; &lt;/li&gt; &lt;/ul&gt;  |[m
[31m-| &lt;a href="/sql/alter-view" &gt;&lt;code&gt;ALTER VIEW&lt;/code&gt;&lt;/a&gt; | &lt;ul&gt; &lt;li&gt;Ownership of the view being altered.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;li&gt;In addition, to change owners: &lt;ul&gt; &lt;li&gt;Role membership in &lt;code&gt;new_owner&lt;/code&gt;.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;li&gt;&lt;code&gt;CREATE&lt;/code&gt; privileges on the containing schema if the view is namespaced by a schema.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;/ul&gt; &lt;/li&gt; &lt;/ul&gt;  |[m
[31m-| &lt;a href="/sql/comment-on" &gt;&lt;code&gt;COMMENT ON&lt;/code&gt;&lt;/a&gt; | &lt;ul&gt; &lt;li&gt;Ownership of the object being commented on (unless the object is a role).&lt;/li&gt; &lt;li&gt;To comment on a role, you must have the &lt;code&gt;CREATEROLE&lt;/code&gt; privilege.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;/ul&gt;  |[m
[31m-| &lt;a href="/sql/copy-from" &gt;&lt;code&gt;COPY FROM&lt;/code&gt;&lt;/a&gt; | &lt;ul&gt; &lt;li&gt;&lt;code&gt;USAGE&lt;/code&gt; privileges on the schema containing the table.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;li&gt;&lt;code&gt;INSERT&lt;/code&gt; privileges on the table.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;/ul&gt;  |[m
[31m-| &lt;a href="/sql/copy-to" &gt;&lt;code&gt;COPY TO&lt;/code&gt;&lt;/a&gt; | &lt;ul&gt; &lt;li&gt;&lt;code&gt;USAGE&lt;/code&gt; privileges on the schemas that all relations and types in the query are contained in.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;li&gt;&lt;code&gt;SELECT&lt;/code&gt; privileges on all relations in the query. &lt;ul&gt; &lt;li&gt;NOTE: if any item is a view, then the view owner must also have the necessary privileges to execute the view definition. Even if the view owner is a &lt;em&gt;superuser&lt;/em&gt;, they still must explicitly be granted the necessary privileges.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;/ul&gt; &lt;/li&gt; &lt;li&gt;&lt;code&gt;USAGE&lt;/code&gt; privileges on all types used in the query.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;li&gt;&lt;code&gt;USAGE&lt;/code&gt; privileges on the active cluster.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;/ul&gt;  |[m
[31m-| &lt;a href="/sql/create-cluster" &gt;&lt;code&gt;CREATE CLUSTER&lt;/code&gt;&lt;/a&gt; | &lt;ul&gt; &lt;li&gt;&lt;code&gt;CREATECLUSTER&lt;/code&gt; privileges on the system.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;/ul&gt;  |[m
[31m-| &lt;a href="/sql/create-cluster-replica" &gt;&lt;code&gt;CREATE CLUSTER REPLICA&lt;/code&gt;&lt;/a&gt; | &lt;ul&gt; &lt;li&gt;Ownership of the cluster.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;/ul&gt;  |[m
[31m-| &lt;a href="/sql/create-connection" &gt;&lt;code&gt;CREATE CONNECTION&lt;/code&gt;&lt;/a&gt; | &lt;ul&gt; &lt;li&gt;&lt;code&gt;CREATE&lt;/code&gt; privileges on the containing schema.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;li&gt;&lt;code&gt;USAGE&lt;/code&gt; privileges on all connections and secrets used in the connection definition.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;li&gt;&lt;code&gt;USAGE&lt;/code&gt; privileges on the schemas that all connections and secrets in the statement are contained in.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;/ul&gt;  |[m
[31m-| &lt;a href="/sql/create-database" &gt;&lt;code&gt;CREATE DATABASE&lt;/code&gt;&lt;/a&gt; | &lt;ul&gt; &lt;li&gt;&lt;code&gt;CREATEDB&lt;/code&gt; privileges on the system.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;/ul&gt;  |[m
[31m-| &lt;a href="/sql/create-index" &gt;&lt;code&gt;CREATE INDEX&lt;/code&gt;&lt;/a&gt; | &lt;ul&gt; &lt;li&gt;Ownership of the object on which to create the index.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;li&gt;&lt;code&gt;CREATE&lt;/code&gt; privileges on the containing schema.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;li&gt;&lt;code&gt;CREATE&lt;/code&gt; privileges on the containing cluster.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;li&gt;&lt;code&gt;USAGE&lt;/code&gt; privileges on all types used in the index definition.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;li&gt;&lt;code&gt;USAGE&lt;/code&gt; privileges on the schemas that all types in the statement are contained in.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;/ul&gt;  |[m
[31m-| &lt;a href="/sql/create-materialized-view" &gt;&lt;code&gt;CREATE MATERIALIZED VIEW&lt;/code&gt;&lt;/a&gt; | &lt;ul&gt; &lt;li&gt;&lt;code&gt;CREATE&lt;/code&gt; privileges on the containing schema.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;li&gt;&lt;code&gt;CREATE&lt;/code&gt; privileges on the containing cluster.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;li&gt;&lt;code&gt;USAGE&lt;/code&gt; privileges on all types used in the materialized view definition.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;li&gt;&lt;code&gt;USAGE&lt;/code&gt; privileges on the schemas for the types used in the statement.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;/ul&gt;  |[m
[31m-| &lt;a href="/sql/create-network-policy/" &gt;&lt;code&gt;CREATE NETWORK POLICY&lt;/code&gt;&lt;/a&gt; | &lt;ul&gt; &lt;li&gt;&lt;code&gt;CREATENETWORKPOLICY&lt;/code&gt; privileges on the system.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;/ul&gt;  |[m
[31m-| &lt;a href="/sql/create-role" &gt;&lt;code&gt;CREATE ROLE&lt;/code&gt;&lt;/a&gt; | &lt;ul&gt; &lt;li&gt;&lt;code&gt;CREATEROLE&lt;/code&gt; privileges on the system.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;/ul&gt;  |[m
[31m-| &lt;a href="/sql/create-schema" &gt;&lt;code&gt;CREATE SCHEMA&lt;/code&gt;&lt;/a&gt; | &lt;ul&gt; &lt;li&gt;&lt;code&gt;CREATE&lt;/code&gt; privileges on the containing database.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;/ul&gt;  |[m
[31m-| &lt;a href="/sql/create-secret" &gt;&lt;code&gt;CREATE SECRET&lt;/code&gt;&lt;/a&gt; | &lt;ul&gt; &lt;li&gt;&lt;code&gt;CREATE&lt;/code&gt; privileges on the containing schema.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;/ul&gt;  |[m
[31m-| &lt;a href="/sql/create-sink" &gt;&lt;code&gt;CREATE SINK&lt;/code&gt;&lt;/a&gt; | &lt;ul&gt; &lt;li&gt;&lt;code&gt;CREATE&lt;/code&gt; privileges on the containing schema.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;li&gt;&lt;code&gt;SELECT&lt;/code&gt; privileges on the item being written out to an external system. &lt;ul&gt; &lt;li&gt;NOTE: if the item is a materialized view, then the view owner must also have the necessary privileges to execute the view definition.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;/ul&gt; &lt;/li&gt; &lt;li&gt;&lt;code&gt;CREATE&lt;/code&gt; privileges on the containing cluster if the sink is created in an existing cluster.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;li&gt;&lt;code&gt;CREATECLUSTER&lt;/code&gt; privileges on the system if the sink is not created in an existing cluster.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;li&gt;&lt;code&gt;USAGE&lt;/code&gt; privileges on all connections and secrets used in the sink definition.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;li&gt;&lt;code&gt;USAGE&lt;/code&gt; privileges on the schemas that all connections and secrets in the statement are contained in.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;/ul&gt;  |[m
[31m-| &lt;a href="/sql/create-source" &gt;&lt;code&gt;CREATE SOURCE&lt;/code&gt;&lt;/a&gt; | &lt;ul&gt; &lt;li&gt;&lt;code&gt;CREATE&lt;/code&gt; privileges on the containing schema.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;li&gt;&lt;code&gt;CREATE&lt;/code&gt; privileges on the containing cluster if the source is created in an existing cluster.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;li&gt;&lt;code&gt;CREATECLUSTER&lt;/code&gt; privileges on the system if the source is not created in an existing cluster.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;li&gt;&lt;code&gt;USAGE&lt;/code&gt; privileges on all connections and secrets used in the source definition.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;li&gt;&lt;code&gt;USAGE&lt;/code&gt; privileges on the schemas that all connections and secrets in the statement are contained in.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;/ul&gt;  |[m
[31m-| &lt;a href="/sql/create-table" &gt;&lt;code&gt;CREATE TABLE&lt;/code&gt;&lt;/a&gt; | &lt;ul&gt; &lt;li&gt;&lt;code&gt;CREATE&lt;/code&gt; privileges on the containing schema.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;li&gt;&lt;code&gt;USAGE&lt;/code&gt; privileges on all types used in the table definition.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;li&gt;&lt;code&gt;USAGE&lt;/code&gt; privileges on the schemas that all types in the statement are contained in.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;/ul&gt;  |[m
[31m-| &lt;a href="/sql/create-type" &gt;&lt;code&gt;CREATE TYPE&lt;/code&gt;&lt;/a&gt; | &lt;ul&gt; &lt;li&gt;&lt;code&gt;CREATE&lt;/code&gt; privileges on the containing schema.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;li&gt;&lt;code&gt;USAGE&lt;/code&gt; privileges on all types used in the type definition.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;li&gt;&lt;code&gt;USAGE&lt;/code&gt; privileges on the schemas that all types in the statement are contained in.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;/ul&gt;  |[m
[31m-| &lt;a href="/sql/create-view" &gt;&lt;code&gt;CREATE VIEW&lt;/code&gt;&lt;/a&gt; | &lt;ul&gt; &lt;li&gt;&lt;code&gt;CREATE&lt;/code&gt; privileges on the containing schema.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;li&gt;&lt;code&gt;USAGE&lt;/code&gt; privileges on all types used in the view definition.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;li&gt;&lt;code&gt;USAGE&lt;/code&gt; privileges on the schemas for the types in the statement.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;li&gt;Ownership of the existing view if replacing an existing view with the same name (i.e., &lt;code&gt;OR REPLACE&lt;/code&gt; is specified in &lt;code&gt;CREATE VIEW&lt;/code&gt; command).&lt;/li&gt; &lt;/ul&gt;  |[m
[31m-| &lt;a href="/sql/delete" &gt;&lt;code&gt;DELETE&lt;/code&gt;&lt;/a&gt; | &lt;ul&gt; &lt;li&gt;&lt;code&gt;USAGE&lt;/code&gt; privileges on the schemas that all relations and types in the query are contained in.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;li&gt;&lt;code&gt;DELETE&lt;/code&gt; privileges on &lt;code&gt;table_name&lt;/code&gt;.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;li&gt;&lt;code&gt;SELECT&lt;/code&gt; privileges on all relations in the query. &lt;ul&gt; &lt;li&gt;NOTE: if any item is a view, then the view owner must also have the necessary privileges to execute the view definition. Even if the view owner is a &lt;em&gt;superuser&lt;/em&gt;, they still must explicitly be granted the necessary privileges.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;/ul&gt; &lt;/li&gt; &lt;li&gt;&lt;code&gt;USAGE&lt;/code&gt; privileges on all types used in the query.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;li&gt;&lt;code&gt;USAGE&lt;/code&gt; privileges on the active cluster.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;/ul&gt;  |[m
[31m-| &lt;a href="/sql/drop-cluster-replica" &gt;&lt;code&gt;DROP CLUSTER REPLICA&lt;/code&gt;&lt;/a&gt; | &lt;ul&gt; &lt;li&gt;Ownership of the dropped cluster replica.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;li&gt;&lt;code&gt;USAGE&lt;/code&gt; privileges on the containing cluster.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;/ul&gt;  |[m
[31m-| &lt;a href="/sql/drop-cluster" &gt;&lt;code&gt;DROP CLUSTER&lt;/code&gt;&lt;/a&gt; | &lt;ul&gt; &lt;li&gt;Ownership of the dropped cluster.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;/ul&gt;  |[m
[31m-| &lt;a href="/sql/drop-connection" &gt;&lt;code&gt;DROP CONNECTION&lt;/code&gt;&lt;/a&gt; | &lt;ul&gt; &lt;li&gt;Ownership of the dropped connection.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;li&gt;&lt;code&gt;USAGE&lt;/code&gt; privileges on the containing schema.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;/ul&gt;  |[m
[31m-| &lt;a href="/sql/drop-database" &gt;&lt;code&gt;DROP DATABASE&lt;/code&gt;&lt;/a&gt; | &lt;ul&gt; &lt;li&gt;Ownership of the dropped database.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;/ul&gt;  |[m
[31m-| &lt;a href="/sql/drop-index" &gt;&lt;code&gt;DROP INDEX&lt;/code&gt;&lt;/a&gt; | &lt;ul&gt; &lt;li&gt;Ownership of the dropped index.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;li&gt;&lt;code&gt;USAGE&lt;/code&gt; privileges on the containing schema.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;/ul&gt;  |[m
[31m-| &lt;a href="/sql/drop-materialized-view" &gt;&lt;code&gt;DROP MATERIALIZED VIEW&lt;/code&gt;&lt;/a&gt; | &lt;ul&gt; &lt;li&gt;Ownership of the dropped materialized view.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;li&gt;&lt;code&gt;USAGE&lt;/code&gt; privileges on the containing schema.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;/ul&gt;  |[m
[31m-| &lt;a href="/sql/drop-network-policy" &gt;&lt;code&gt;DROP NETWORK POLICY&lt;/code&gt;&lt;/a&gt; | &lt;ul&gt; &lt;li&gt;&lt;code&gt;CREATENETWORKPOLICY&lt;/code&gt; privileges on the system.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;/ul&gt;  |[m
[31m-| &lt;a href="/sql/drop-owned" &gt;&lt;code&gt;DROP OWNED&lt;/code&gt;&lt;/a&gt; | &lt;ul&gt; &lt;li&gt;Role membership in &lt;code&gt;role_name&lt;/code&gt;.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;/ul&gt;  |[m
[31m-| &lt;a href="/sql/drop-role" &gt;&lt;code&gt;DROP ROLE&lt;/code&gt;&lt;/a&gt; | &lt;ul&gt; &lt;li&gt;&lt;code&gt;CREATEROLE&lt;/code&gt; privileges on the system.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;/ul&gt;  |[m
[31m-| &lt;a href="/sql/drop-schema" &gt;&lt;code&gt;DROP SCHEMA&lt;/code&gt;&lt;/a&gt; | &lt;ul&gt; &lt;li&gt;Ownership of the dropped schema.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;li&gt;&lt;code&gt;USAGE&lt;/code&gt; privileges on the containing database.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;/ul&gt;  |[m
[31m-| &lt;a href="/sql/drop-secret" &gt;&lt;code&gt;DROP SECRET&lt;/code&gt;&lt;/a&gt; | &lt;ul&gt; &lt;li&gt;Ownership of the dropped secret.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;li&gt;&lt;code&gt;USAGE&lt;/code&gt; privileges on the containing schema.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;/ul&gt;  |[m
[31m-| &lt;a href="/sql/drop-sink" &gt;&lt;code&gt;DROP SINK&lt;/code&gt;&lt;/a&gt; | &lt;ul&gt; &lt;li&gt;Ownership of the dropped sink.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;li&gt;&lt;code&gt;USAGE&lt;/code&gt; privileges on the containing schema.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;/ul&gt;  |[m
[31m-| &lt;a href="/sql/drop-source" &gt;&lt;code&gt;DROP SOURCE&lt;/code&gt;&lt;/a&gt; | &lt;ul&gt; &lt;li&gt;Ownership of the dropped source.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;li&gt;&lt;code&gt;USAGE&lt;/code&gt; privileges on the containing schema.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;/ul&gt;  |[m
[31m-| &lt;a href="/sql/drop-table" &gt;&lt;code&gt;DROP TABLE&lt;/code&gt;&lt;/a&gt; | &lt;ul&gt; &lt;li&gt;Ownership of the dropped table.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;li&gt;&lt;code&gt;USAGE&lt;/code&gt; privileges on the containing schema.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;/ul&gt;  |[m
[31m-| &lt;a href="/sql/drop-type" &gt;&lt;code&gt;DROP TYPE&lt;/code&gt;&lt;/a&gt; | &lt;ul&gt; &lt;li&gt;Ownership of the dropped type.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;li&gt;&lt;code&gt;USAGE&lt;/code&gt; privileges on the containing schema.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;/ul&gt;  |[m
[31m-| &lt;a href="/sql/drop-user" &gt;&lt;code&gt;DROP USER&lt;/code&gt;&lt;/a&gt; | &lt;ul&gt; &lt;li&gt;&lt;code&gt;CREATEROLE&lt;/code&gt; privileges on the system.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;/ul&gt;  |[m
[31m-| &lt;a href="/sql/drop-view" &gt;&lt;code&gt;DROP VIEW&lt;/code&gt;&lt;/a&gt; | &lt;ul&gt; &lt;li&gt;Ownership of the dropped view.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;li&gt;&lt;code&gt;USAGE&lt;/code&gt; privileges on the containing schema.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;/ul&gt;  |[m
[31m-| &lt;a href="/sql/explain-analyze" &gt;&lt;code&gt;EXPLAIN ANALYZE&lt;/code&gt;&lt;/a&gt; | &lt;ul&gt; &lt;li&gt;&lt;code&gt;USAGE&lt;/code&gt; privileges on the schemas that all relations in the explainee are contained in.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;/ul&gt;  |[m
[31m-| &lt;a href="/sql/explain-filter-pushdown" &gt;&lt;code&gt;EXPLAIN FILTER PUSHDOWN&lt;/code&gt;&lt;/a&gt; | &lt;ul&gt; &lt;li&gt;&lt;code&gt;USAGE&lt;/code&gt; privileges on the schemas that all relations in the explainee are contained in.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;/ul&gt;  |[m
[31m-| &lt;a href="/sql/explain-plan" &gt;&lt;code&gt;EXPLAIN PLAN&lt;/code&gt;&lt;/a&gt; | &lt;ul&gt; &lt;li&gt;&lt;code&gt;USAGE&lt;/code&gt; privileges on the schemas that all relations in the explainee are contained in.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;/ul&gt;  |[m
[31m-| &lt;a href="/sql/explain-schema" &gt;&lt;code&gt;EXPLAIN SCHEMA&lt;/code&gt;&lt;/a&gt; | &lt;ul&gt; &lt;li&gt;&lt;code&gt;USAGE&lt;/code&gt; privileges on the schemas that all items in the query are contained in.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;/ul&gt;  |[m
[31m-| &lt;a href="/sql/explain-timestamp" &gt;&lt;code&gt;EXPLAIN TIMESTAMP&lt;/code&gt;&lt;/a&gt; | &lt;ul&gt; &lt;li&gt;&lt;code&gt;USAGE&lt;/code&gt; privileges on the schemas that all relations in the query are contained in.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;/ul&gt;  |[m
[31m-| &lt;a href="/sql/grant-privilege" &gt;&lt;code&gt;GRANT PRIVILEGE&lt;/code&gt;&lt;/a&gt; | &lt;ul&gt; &lt;li&gt;Ownership of affected objects.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;li&gt;&lt;code&gt;USAGE&lt;/code&gt; privileges on the containing database if the affected object is a schema.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;li&gt;&lt;code&gt;USAGE&lt;/code&gt; privileges on the containing schema if the affected object is namespaced by a schema.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;li&gt;&lt;em&gt;superuser&lt;/em&gt; status if the privilege is a system privilege.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;/ul&gt;  |[m
[31m-| &lt;a href="/sql/grant-role" &gt;&lt;code&gt;GRANT ROLE&lt;/code&gt;&lt;/a&gt; | &lt;ul&gt; &lt;li&gt;&lt;code&gt;CREATEROLE&lt;/code&gt; privileges on the system.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;/ul&gt;  |[m
[31m-| &lt;a href="/sql/insert" &gt;&lt;code&gt;INSERT&lt;/code&gt;&lt;/a&gt; | &lt;ul&gt; &lt;li&gt;&lt;code&gt;USAGE&lt;/code&gt; privileges on the schemas that all relations and types in the query are contained in.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;li&gt;&lt;code&gt;INSERT&lt;/code&gt; privileges on &lt;code&gt;table_name&lt;/code&gt;.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;li&gt;&lt;code&gt;SELECT&lt;/code&gt; privileges on all relations in the query. &lt;ul&gt; &lt;li&gt;NOTE: if any item is a view, then the view owner must also have the necessary privileges to execute the view definition. Even if the view owner is a &lt;em&gt;superuser&lt;/em&gt;, they still must explicitly be granted the necessary privileges.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;/ul&gt; &lt;/li&gt; &lt;li&gt;&lt;code&gt;USAGE&lt;/code&gt; privileges on all types used in the query.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;li&gt;&lt;code&gt;USAGE&lt;/code&gt; privileges on the active cluster.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;/ul&gt;  |[m
[31m-| &lt;a href="/sql/reassign-owned" &gt;&lt;code&gt;REASSIGN OWNED&lt;/code&gt;&lt;/a&gt; | &lt;ul&gt; &lt;li&gt;Role membership in &lt;code&gt;old_role&lt;/code&gt; and &lt;code&gt;new_role&lt;/code&gt;.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;/ul&gt;  |[m
[31m-| &lt;a href="/sql/revoke-privilege" &gt;&lt;code&gt;REVOKE PRIVILEGE&lt;/code&gt;&lt;/a&gt; | &lt;ul&gt; &lt;li&gt;Ownership of affected objects.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;li&gt;&lt;code&gt;USAGE&lt;/code&gt; privileges on the containing database if the affected object is a schema.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;li&gt;&lt;code&gt;USAGE&lt;/code&gt; privileges on the containing schema if the affected object is namespaced by a schema.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;li&gt;&lt;em&gt;superuser&lt;/em&gt; status if the privilege is a system privilege.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;/ul&gt;  |[m
[31m-| &lt;a href="/sql/revoke-role" &gt;&lt;code&gt;REVOKE ROLE&lt;/code&gt;&lt;/a&gt; | &lt;ul&gt; &lt;li&gt;&lt;code&gt;CREATEROLE&lt;/code&gt; privileges on the systems.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;/ul&gt;  |[m
[31m-| &lt;a href="/sql/select" &gt;&lt;code&gt;SELECT&lt;/code&gt;&lt;/a&gt; | &lt;ul&gt; &lt;li&gt; &lt;p&gt;&lt;code&gt;SELECT&lt;/code&gt; privileges on all &lt;strong&gt;directly&lt;/strong&gt; referenced relations in the query. If the directly referenced relation is a view or materialized view: - &lt;code&gt;SELECT&lt;/code&gt; privileges are required only on the directly referenced view/materialized view. &lt;code&gt;SELECT&lt;/code&gt; privileges are &lt;strong&gt;not&lt;/strong&gt; required for the underlying relations referenced in the view/materialized view definition unless those relations themselves are directly referenced in the query.&lt;/p&gt; &lt;/li&gt; &lt;li&gt; &lt;p&gt;However, the owner of the view/materialized view (including those with &lt;strong&gt;superuser&lt;/strong&gt; privileges) must have all required &lt;code&gt;SELECT&lt;/code&gt; and &lt;code&gt;USAGE&lt;/code&gt; privileges to run the view definition regardless of who is selecting from the view/materialized view.&lt;/p&gt; &lt;/li&gt; &lt;li&gt; &lt;p&gt;&lt;code&gt;USAGE&lt;/code&gt; privileges on the schemas that contain the relations in the query.&lt;/p&gt; &lt;/li&gt; &lt;li&gt; &lt;p&gt;&lt;code&gt;USAGE&lt;/code&gt; privileges on the active cluster.&lt;/p&gt; &lt;/li&gt; &lt;/ul&gt;  |[m
[31m-| &lt;a href="/sql/show-columns" &gt;&lt;code&gt;SHOW COLUMNS&lt;/code&gt;&lt;/a&gt; | &lt;ul&gt; &lt;li&gt;&lt;code&gt;USAGE&lt;/code&gt; privileges on the schema containing &lt;code&gt;item_ref&lt;/code&gt;.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;/ul&gt;  |[m
[31m-| &lt;a href="/sql/show-create-cluster" &gt;&lt;code&gt;SHOW CREATE CLUSTER&lt;/code&gt;&lt;/a&gt; | There are no privileges required to execute this statement. |[m
[31m-| &lt;a href="/sql/show-create-connection" &gt;&lt;code&gt;SHOW CREATE CONNECTION&lt;/code&gt;&lt;/a&gt; | &lt;ul&gt; &lt;li&gt;&lt;code&gt;USAGE&lt;/code&gt; privileges on the schema containing the connection.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;/ul&gt;  |[m
[31m-| &lt;a href="/sql/show-create-index" &gt;&lt;code&gt;SHOW CREATE INDEX&lt;/code&gt;&lt;/a&gt; | &lt;ul&gt; &lt;li&gt;&lt;code&gt;USAGE&lt;/code&gt; privileges on the schema containing the index.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;/ul&gt;  |[m
[31m-| &lt;a href="/sql/show-create-materialized-view" &gt;&lt;code&gt;SHOW CREATE MATERIALIZED VIEW&lt;/code&gt;&lt;/a&gt; | &lt;ul&gt; &lt;li&gt;&lt;code&gt;USAGE&lt;/code&gt; privileges on the schema containing the materialized view.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;/ul&gt;  |[m
[31m-| &lt;a href="/sql/show-create-type" &gt;&lt;code&gt;SHOW CREATE TYPE&lt;/code&gt;&lt;/a&gt; | &lt;ul&gt; &lt;li&gt;&lt;code&gt;USAGE&lt;/code&gt; privileges on the schema containing the table.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;/ul&gt;  |[m
[31m-| &lt;a href="/sql/show-create-sink" &gt;&lt;code&gt;SHOW CREATE SINK&lt;/code&gt;&lt;/a&gt; | &lt;ul&gt; &lt;li&gt;&lt;code&gt;USAGE&lt;/code&gt; privileges on the schema containing the sink.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;/ul&gt;  |[m
[31m-| &lt;a href="/sql/show-create-source" &gt;&lt;code&gt;SHOW CREATE SOURCE&lt;/code&gt;&lt;/a&gt; | &lt;ul&gt; &lt;li&gt;&lt;code&gt;USAGE&lt;/code&gt; privileges on the schema containing the source.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;/ul&gt;  |[m
[31m-| &lt;a href="/sql/show-create-table" &gt;&lt;code&gt;SHOW CREATE TABLE&lt;/code&gt;&lt;/a&gt; | &lt;ul&gt; &lt;li&gt;&lt;code&gt;USAGE&lt;/code&gt; privileges on the schema containing the table.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;/ul&gt;  |[m
[31m-| &lt;a href="/sql/show-create-view" &gt;&lt;code&gt;SHOW CREATE VIEW&lt;/code&gt;&lt;/a&gt; | &lt;ul&gt; &lt;li&gt;&lt;code&gt;USAGE&lt;/code&gt; privileges on the schema containing the view.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;/ul&gt;  |[m
[31m-| &lt;a href="/sql/subscribe" &gt;&lt;code&gt;SUBSCRIBE&lt;/code&gt;&lt;/a&gt; | &lt;ul&gt; &lt;li&gt;&lt;code&gt;USAGE&lt;/code&gt; privileges on the schemas that all relations and types in the query are contained in.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;li&gt;&lt;code&gt;SELECT&lt;/code&gt; privileges on all relations in the query. &lt;ul&gt; &lt;li&gt;NOTE: if any item is a view, then the view owner must also have the necessary privileges to execute the view definition. Even if the view owner is a &lt;em&gt;superuser&lt;/em&gt;, they still must explicitly be granted the necessary privileges.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;/ul&gt; &lt;/li&gt; &lt;li&gt;&lt;code&gt;USAGE&lt;/code&gt; privileges on all types used in the query.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;li&gt;&lt;code&gt;USAGE&lt;/code&gt; privileges on the active cluster.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;/ul&gt;  |[m
[31m-| &lt;a href="/sql/update" &gt;&lt;code&gt;UPDATE&lt;/code&gt;&lt;/a&gt; | &lt;ul&gt; &lt;li&gt;&lt;code&gt;USAGE&lt;/code&gt; privileges on the schemas that all relations and types in the query are contained in.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;li&gt;&lt;code&gt;UPDATE&lt;/code&gt; privileges on the table being updated.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;li&gt;&lt;code&gt;SELECT&lt;/code&gt; privileges on all relations in the query. &lt;ul&gt; &lt;li&gt;NOTE: if any item is a view, then the view owner must also have the necessary privileges to execute the view definition. Even if the view owner is a &lt;em&gt;superuser&lt;/em&gt;, they still must explicitly be granted the necessary privileges.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;/ul&gt; &lt;/li&gt; &lt;li&gt;&lt;code&gt;USAGE&lt;/code&gt; privileges on all types used in the query.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;li&gt;&lt;code&gt;USAGE&lt;/code&gt; privileges on the active cluster.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;/ul&gt;  |[m
[31m-| &lt;a href="/sql/validate-connection" &gt;&lt;code&gt;VALIDATE CONNECTION&lt;/code&gt;&lt;/a&gt; | &lt;ul&gt; &lt;li&gt;&lt;code&gt;USAGE&lt;/code&gt; privileges on the containing schema.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;li&gt;&lt;code&gt;USAGE&lt;/code&gt; privileges on the connection.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;/ul&gt;  |[m
[32m+[m[32m| &lt;a href="/sql/alter-cluster" &gt;&lt;code&gt;ALTER CLUSTER&lt;/code&gt;&lt;/a&gt; | &lt;ul&gt; &lt;li&gt; &lt;p&gt;Ownership of the cluster.&lt;/p&gt; &lt;/li&gt; &lt;li&gt; &lt;p&gt;To rename a cluster, you must also have membership in the &lt;code&gt;&amp;lt;new_owner_role&amp;gt;&lt;/code&gt;.&lt;/p&gt; &lt;/li&gt; &lt;li&gt; &lt;p&gt;To swap names with another cluster, you must also have ownership of the other cluster.&lt;/p&gt; &lt;/li&gt; &lt;/ul&gt;   |[m
[32m+[m[32m| &lt;a href="/sql/alter-cluster-replica" &gt;&lt;code&gt;ALTER CLUSTER REPLICA&lt;/code&gt;&lt;/a&gt; | &lt;ul&gt; &lt;li&gt;Ownership of the cluster replica.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;li&gt;In addition, to change owners: &lt;ul&gt; &lt;li&gt;Role membership in &lt;code&gt;new_owner&lt;/code&gt;.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;li&gt;&lt;code&gt;CREATE&lt;/code&gt; privileges on the containing cluster.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;/ul&gt; &lt;/li&gt; &lt;/ul&gt;   |[m
[32m+[m[32m| &lt;a href="/sql/alter-connection" &gt;&lt;code&gt;ALTER CONNECTION&lt;/code&gt;&lt;/a&gt; | &lt;ul&gt; &lt;li&gt;Ownership of the connection.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;li&gt;In addition, to change owners: &lt;ul&gt; &lt;li&gt;Role membership in &lt;code&gt;new_owner&lt;/code&gt;.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;li&gt;&lt;code&gt;CREATE&lt;/code&gt; privileges on the containing schema if the connection is namespaced by a schema.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;/ul&gt; &lt;/li&gt; &lt;/ul&gt;   |[m
[32m+[m[32m| &lt;a href="/sql/alter-database" &gt;&lt;code&gt;ALTER DATABASE&lt;/code&gt;&lt;/a&gt; | &lt;ul&gt; &lt;li&gt;Ownership of the database.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;li&gt;In addition, to change owners: &lt;ul&gt; &lt;li&gt;Role membership in &lt;code&gt;new_owner&lt;/code&gt;.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;/ul&gt; &lt;/li&gt; &lt;/ul&gt;   |[m
[32m+[m[32m| &lt;a href="/sql/alter-default-privileges" &gt;&lt;code&gt;ALTER DEFAULT PRIVILEGES&lt;/code&gt;&lt;/a&gt; | &lt;ul&gt; &lt;li&gt;Role membership in &lt;code&gt;role_name&lt;/code&gt;.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;li&gt;&lt;code&gt;USAGE&lt;/code&gt; privileges on the containing database if &lt;code&gt;database_name&lt;/code&gt; is specified.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;li&gt;&lt;code&gt;USAGE&lt;/code&gt; privileges on the containing schema if &lt;code&gt;schema_name&lt;/code&gt; is specified.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;li&gt;&lt;em&gt;superuser&lt;/em&gt; status if the &lt;em&gt;target_role&lt;/em&gt; is &lt;code&gt;PUBLIC&lt;/code&gt; or &lt;strong&gt;ALL ROLES&lt;/strong&gt; is specified.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;/ul&gt;   |[m
[32m+[m[32m| &lt;a href="/sql/alter-index" &gt;&lt;code&gt;ALTER INDEX&lt;/code&gt;&lt;/a&gt; | &lt;ul&gt; &lt;li&gt;Ownership of the index.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;/ul&gt;   |[m
[32m+[m[32m| &lt;a href="/sql/alter-materialized-view" &gt;&lt;code&gt;ALTER MATERIALIZED VIEW&lt;/code&gt;&lt;/a&gt; | &lt;ul&gt; &lt;li&gt;Ownership of the materialized view.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;li&gt;In addition, to change owners: &lt;ul&gt; &lt;li&gt;Role membership in &lt;code&gt;new_owner&lt;/code&gt;.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;li&gt;&lt;code&gt;CREATE&lt;/code&gt; privileges on the containing schema if the materialized view is namespaced by a schema.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;/ul&gt; &lt;/li&gt; &lt;/ul&gt;           |[m
[32m+[m[32m| &lt;a href="/sql/alter-network-policy" &gt;&lt;code&gt;ALTER NETWORK POLICY&lt;/code&gt;&lt;/a&gt; | &lt;ul&gt; &lt;li&gt;Ownership of the network policy.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;/ul&gt;   |[m
[32m+[m[32m| &lt;a href="/sql/alter-role" &gt;&lt;code&gt;ALTER ROLE&lt;/code&gt;&lt;/a&gt; | &lt;ul&gt; &lt;li&gt;&lt;code&gt;CREATEROLE&lt;/code&gt; privileges on the system.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;/ul&gt;   |[m
[32m+[m[32m| &lt;a href="/sql/alter-schema" &gt;&lt;code&gt;ALTER SCHEMA&lt;/code&gt;&lt;/a&gt; | &lt;ul&gt; &lt;li&gt;Ownership of the schema.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;li&gt;In addition, &lt;ul&gt; &lt;li&gt;To swap with another schema: &lt;ul&gt; &lt;li&gt;Ownership of the other schema&lt;/li&gt; &lt;/ul&gt; &lt;/li&gt; &lt;li&gt;To change owners: &lt;ul&gt; &lt;li&gt;Role membership in &lt;code&gt;new_owner&lt;/code&gt;.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;li&gt;&lt;code&gt;CREATE&lt;/code&gt; privileges on the containing database.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;/ul&gt; &lt;/li&gt; &lt;/ul&gt; &lt;/li&gt; &lt;/ul&gt;   |[m
[32m+[m[32m| &lt;a href="/sql/alter-secret" &gt;&lt;code&gt;ALTER SECRET&lt;/code&gt;&lt;/a&gt; | &lt;ul&gt; &lt;li&gt;Ownership of the secret being altered.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;li&gt;In addition, to change owners: &lt;ul&gt; &lt;li&gt;Role membership in &lt;code&gt;new_owner&lt;/code&gt;.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;li&gt;&lt;code&gt;CREATE&lt;/code&gt; privileges on the containing schema if the secret is namespaced by a schema.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;/ul&gt; &lt;/li&gt; &lt;/ul&gt;   |[m
[32m+[m[32m| &lt;a href="/sql/alter-sink" &gt;&lt;code&gt;ALTER SINK&lt;/code&gt;&lt;/a&gt; | &lt;ul&gt; &lt;li&gt;Ownership of the sink being altered.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;li&gt;In addition, &lt;ul&gt; &lt;li&gt;To change the sink from relation: &lt;ul&gt; &lt;li&gt;&lt;code&gt;SELECT&lt;/code&gt; privileges on the new relation being written out to an external system.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;li&gt;&lt;code&gt;CREATE&lt;/code&gt; privileges on the cluster maintaining the sink.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;li&gt;&lt;code&gt;USAGE&lt;/code&gt; privileges on all connections and secrets used in the sink definition.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;li&gt;&lt;code&gt;USAGE&lt;/code&gt; privileges on the schemas that all connections and secrets in the statement are contained in.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;/ul&gt; &lt;/li&gt; &lt;li&gt;To change owners: &lt;ul&gt; &lt;li&gt;Role membership in &lt;code&gt;new_owner&lt;/code&gt;.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;li&gt;&lt;code&gt;CREATE&lt;/code&gt; privileges on the containing schema if the sink is namespaced by a schema.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;/ul&gt; &lt;/li&gt; &lt;/ul&gt; &lt;/li&gt; &lt;/ul&gt;   |[m
[32m+[m[32m| &lt;a href="/sql/alter-source" &gt;&lt;code&gt;ALTER SOURCE&lt;/code&gt;&lt;/a&gt; | &lt;ul&gt; &lt;li&gt;Ownership of the source being altered.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;li&gt;In addition, to change owners: &lt;ul&gt; &lt;li&gt;Role membership in &lt;code&gt;new_owner&lt;/code&gt;.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;li&gt;&lt;code&gt;CREATE&lt;/code&gt; privileges on the containing schema if the source is namespaced by a schema.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;/ul&gt; &lt;/li&gt; &lt;/ul&gt;   |[m
[32m+[m[32m| &lt;a href="/sql/alter-system-reset" &gt;&lt;code&gt;ALTER SYSTEM RESET&lt;/code&gt;&lt;/a&gt; | &lt;ul&gt; &lt;li&gt;&lt;a href="/security/cloud/users-service-accounts/#organization-roles" &gt;&lt;em&gt;Superuser&lt;/em&gt; privileges&lt;/a&gt;&lt;/li&gt; &lt;/ul&gt;   |[m
[32m+[m[32m| &lt;a href="/sql/alter-system-set" &gt;&lt;code&gt;ALTER SYSTEM SET&lt;/code&gt;&lt;/a&gt; | &lt;ul&gt; &lt;li&gt;&lt;a href="/security/cloud/users-service-accounts/#organization-roles" &gt;&lt;em&gt;Superuser&lt;/em&gt; privileges&lt;/a&gt;&lt;/li&gt; &lt;/ul&gt;   |[m
[32m+[m[32m| &lt;a href="/sql/alter-table" &gt;&lt;code&gt;ALTER TABLE&lt;/code&gt;&lt;/a&gt; | &lt;ul&gt; &lt;li&gt;Ownership of the table being altered.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;li&gt;In addition, to change owners: &lt;ul&gt; &lt;li&gt;Role membership in &lt;code&gt;new_owner&lt;/code&gt;.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;li&gt;&lt;code&gt;CREATE&lt;/code&gt; privileges on the containing schema if the table is namespaced by a schema.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;/ul&gt; &lt;/li&gt; &lt;/ul&gt;   |[m
[32m+[m[32m| &lt;a href="/sql/alter-type" &gt;&lt;code&gt;ALTER TYPE&lt;/code&gt;&lt;/a&gt; | &lt;ul&gt; &lt;li&gt;Ownership of the type being altered.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;li&gt;In addition, to change owners: &lt;ul&gt; &lt;li&gt;Role membership in &lt;code&gt;new_owner&lt;/code&gt;.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;li&gt;&lt;code&gt;CREATE&lt;/code&gt; privileges on the containing schema if the type is namespaced by a schema.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;/ul&gt; &lt;/li&gt; &lt;/ul&gt;   |[m
[32m+[m[32m| &lt;a href="/sql/alter-view" &gt;&lt;code&gt;ALTER VIEW&lt;/code&gt;&lt;/a&gt; | &lt;ul&gt; &lt;li&gt;Ownership of the view being altered.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;li&gt;In addition, to change owners: &lt;ul&gt; &lt;li&gt;Role membership in &lt;code&gt;new_owner&lt;/code&gt;.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;li&gt;&lt;code&gt;CREATE&lt;/code&gt; privileges on the containing schema if the view is namespaced by a schema.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;/ul&gt; &lt;/li&gt; &lt;/ul&gt;   |[m
[32m+[m[32m| &lt;a href="/sql/comment-on" &gt;&lt;code&gt;COMMENT ON&lt;/code&gt;&lt;/a&gt; | &lt;ul&gt; &lt;li&gt;Ownership of the object being commented on (unless the object is a role).&lt;/li&gt; &lt;li&gt;To comment on a role, you must have the &lt;code&gt;CREATEROLE&lt;/code&gt; privilege.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;/ul&gt;   |[m
[32m+[m[32m| &lt;a href="/sql/copy-from" &gt;&lt;code&gt;COPY FROM&lt;/code&gt;&lt;/a&gt; | &lt;ul&gt; &lt;li&gt;&lt;code&gt;USAGE&lt;/code&gt; privileges on the schema containing the table.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;li&gt;&lt;code&gt;INSERT&lt;/code&gt; privileges on the table.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;/ul&gt;   |[m
[32m+[m[32m| &lt;a href="/sql/copy-to" &gt;&lt;code&gt;COPY TO&lt;/code&gt;&lt;/a&gt; | &lt;ul&gt; &lt;li&gt;&lt;code&gt;USAGE&lt;/code&gt; privileges on the schemas that all relations and types in the query are contained in.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;li&gt;&lt;code&gt;SELECT&lt;/code&gt; privileges on all relations in the query. &lt;ul&gt; &lt;li&gt;NOTE: if any item is a view, then the view owner must also have the necessary privileges to execute the view definition. Even if the view owner is a &lt;em&gt;superuser&lt;/em&gt;, they still must explicitly be granted the necessary privileges.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;/ul&gt; &lt;/li&gt; &lt;li&gt;&lt;code&gt;USAGE&lt;/code&gt; privileges on all types used in the query.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;li&gt;&lt;code&gt;USAGE&lt;/code&gt; privileges on the active cluster.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;/ul&gt;   |[m
[32m+[m[32m| &lt;a href="/sql/create-cluster" &gt;&lt;code&gt;CREATE CLUSTER&lt;/code&gt;&lt;/a&gt; | &lt;ul&gt; &lt;li&gt;&lt;code&gt;CREATECLUSTER&lt;/code&gt; privileges on the system.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;/ul&gt;   |[m
[32m+[m[32m| &lt;a href="/sql/create-cluster-replica" &gt;&lt;code&gt;CREATE CLUSTER REPLICA&lt;/code&gt;&lt;/a&gt; | &lt;ul&gt; &lt;li&gt;Ownership of the cluster.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;/ul&gt;   |[m
[32m+[m[32m| &lt;a href="/sql/create-connection" &gt;&lt;code&gt;CREATE CONNECTION&lt;/code&gt;&lt;/a&gt; | &lt;ul&gt; &lt;li&gt;&lt;code&gt;CREATE&lt;/code&gt; privileges on the containing schema.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;li&gt;&lt;code&gt;USAGE&lt;/code&gt; privileges on all connections and secrets used in the connection definition.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;li&gt;&lt;code&gt;USAGE&lt;/code&gt; privileges on the schemas that all connections and secrets in the statement are contained in.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;/ul&gt;   |[m
[32m+[m[32m| &lt;a href="/sql/create-database" &gt;&lt;code&gt;CREATE DATABASE&lt;/code&gt;&lt;/a&gt; | &lt;ul&gt; &lt;li&gt;&lt;code&gt;CREATEDB&lt;/code&gt; privileges on the system.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;/ul&gt;   |[m
[32m+[m[32m| &lt;a href="/sql/create-index" &gt;&lt;code&gt;CREATE INDEX&lt;/code&gt;&lt;/a&gt; | &lt;ul&gt; &lt;li&gt;Ownership of the object on which to create the index.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;li&gt;&lt;code&gt;CREATE&lt;/code&gt; privileges on the containing schema.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;li&gt;&lt;code&gt;CREATE&lt;/code&gt; privileges on the containing cluster.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;li&gt;&lt;code&gt;USAGE&lt;/code&gt; privileges on all types used in the index definition.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;li&gt;&lt;code&gt;USAGE&lt;/code&gt; privileges on the schemas that all types in the statement are contained in.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;/ul&gt;   |[m
[32m+[m[32m| &lt;a href="/sql/create-materialized-view" &gt;&lt;code&gt;CREATE MATERIALIZED VIEW&lt;/code&gt;&lt;/a&gt; | &lt;ul&gt; &lt;li&gt;&lt;code&gt;CREATE&lt;/code&gt; privileges on the containing schema.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;li&gt;&lt;code&gt;CREATE&lt;/code&gt; privileges on the containing cluster.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;li&gt;&lt;code&gt;USAGE&lt;/code&gt; privileges on all types used in the materialized view definition.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;li&gt;&lt;code&gt;USAGE&lt;/code&gt; privileges on the schemas for the types used in the statement.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;/ul&gt;   |[m
[32m+[m[32m| &lt;a href="/sql/create-network-policy/" &gt;&lt;code&gt;CREATE NETWORK POLICY&lt;/code&gt;&lt;/a&gt; | &lt;ul&gt; &lt;li&gt;&lt;code&gt;CREATENETWORKPOLICY&lt;/code&gt; privileges on the system.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;/ul&gt;   |[m
[32m+[m[32m| &lt;a href="/sql/create-role" &gt;&lt;code&gt;CREATE ROLE&lt;/code&gt;&lt;/a&gt; | &lt;ul&gt; &lt;li&gt;&lt;code&gt;CREATEROLE&lt;/code&gt; privileges on the system.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;/ul&gt;   |[m
[32m+[m[32m| &lt;a href="/sql/create-schema" &gt;&lt;code&gt;CREATE SCHEMA&lt;/code&gt;&lt;/a&gt; | &lt;ul&gt; &lt;li&gt;&lt;code&gt;CREATE&lt;/code&gt; privileges on the containing database.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;/ul&gt;   |[m
[32m+[m[32m| &lt;a href="/sql/create-secret" &gt;&lt;code&gt;CREATE SECRET&lt;/code&gt;&lt;/a&gt; | &lt;ul&gt; &lt;li&gt;&lt;code&gt;CREATE&lt;/code&gt; privileges on the containing schema.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;/ul&gt;   |[m
[32m+[m[32m| &lt;a href="/sql/create-sink" &gt;&lt;code&gt;CREATE SINK&lt;/code&gt;&lt;/a&gt; | &lt;ul&gt; &lt;li&gt;&lt;code&gt;CREATE&lt;/code&gt; privileges on the containing schema.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;li&gt;&lt;code&gt;SELECT&lt;/code&gt; privileges on the item being written out to an external system. &lt;ul&gt; &lt;li&gt;NOTE: if the item is a materialized view, then the view owner must also have the necessary privileges to execute the view definition.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;/ul&gt; &lt;/li&gt; &lt;li&gt;&lt;code&gt;CREATE&lt;/code&gt; privileges on the containing cluster if the sink is created in an existing cluster.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;li&gt;&lt;code&gt;CREATECLUSTER&lt;/code&gt; privileges on the system if the sink is not created in an existing cluster.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;li&gt;&lt;code&gt;USAGE&lt;/code&gt; privileges on all connections and secrets used in the sink definition.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;li&gt;&lt;code&gt;USAGE&lt;/code&gt; privileges on the schemas that all connections and secrets in the statement are contained in.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;/ul&gt;   |[m
[32m+[m[32m| &lt;a href="/sql/create-source" &gt;&lt;code&gt;CREATE SOURCE&lt;/code&gt;&lt;/a&gt; | &lt;ul&gt; &lt;li&gt;&lt;code&gt;CREATE&lt;/code&gt; privileges on the containing schema.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;li&gt;&lt;code&gt;CREATE&lt;/code&gt; privileges on the containing cluster if the source is created in an existing cluster.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;li&gt;&lt;code&gt;CREATECLUSTER&lt;/code&gt; privileges on the system if the source is not created in an existing cluster.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;li&gt;&lt;code&gt;USAGE&lt;/code&gt; privileges on all connections and secrets used in the source definition.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;li&gt;&lt;code&gt;USAGE&lt;/code&gt; privileges on the schemas that all connections and secrets in the statement are contained in.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;/ul&gt;   |[m
[32m+[m[32m| &lt;a href="/sql/create-table" &gt;&lt;code&gt;CREATE TABLE&lt;/code&gt;&lt;/a&gt; | &lt;ul&gt; &lt;li&gt;&lt;code&gt;CREATE&lt;/code&gt; privileges on the containing schema.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;li&gt;&lt;code&gt;USAGE&lt;/code&gt; privileges on all types used in the table definition.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;li&gt;&lt;code&gt;USAGE&lt;/code&gt; privileges on the schemas that all types in the statement are contained in.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;/ul&gt;   |[m
[32m+[m[32m| &lt;a href="/sql/create-type" &gt;&lt;code&gt;CREATE TYPE&lt;/code&gt;&lt;/a&gt; | &lt;ul&gt; &lt;li&gt;&lt;code&gt;CREATE&lt;/code&gt; privileges on the containing schema.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;li&gt;&lt;code&gt;USAGE&lt;/code&gt; privileges on all types used in the type definition.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;li&gt;&lt;code&gt;USAGE&lt;/code&gt; privileges on the schemas that all types in the statement are contained in.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;/ul&gt;   |[m
[32m+[m[32m| &lt;a href="/sql/create-view" &gt;&lt;code&gt;CREATE VIEW&lt;/code&gt;&lt;/a&gt; | &lt;ul&gt; &lt;li&gt;&lt;code&gt;CREATE&lt;/code&gt; privileges on the containing schema.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;li&gt;&lt;code&gt;USAGE&lt;/code&gt; privileges on all types used in the view definition.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;li&gt;&lt;code&gt;USAGE&lt;/code&gt; privileges on the schemas for the types in the statement.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;li&gt;Ownership of the existing view if replacing an existing view with the same name (i.e., &lt;code&gt;OR REPLACE&lt;/code&gt; is specified in &lt;code&gt;CREATE VIEW&lt;/code&gt; command).&lt;/li&gt; &lt;/ul&gt;   |[m
[32m+[m[32m| &lt;a href="/sql/delete" &gt;&lt;code&gt;DELETE&lt;/code&gt;&lt;/a&gt; | &lt;ul&gt; &lt;li&gt;&lt;code&gt;USAGE&lt;/code&gt; privileges on the schemas that all relations and types in the query are contained in.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;li&gt;&lt;code&gt;DELETE&lt;/code&gt; privileges on &lt;code&gt;table_name&lt;/code&gt;.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;li&gt;&lt;code&gt;SELECT&lt;/code&gt; privileges on all relations in the query. &lt;ul&gt; &lt;li&gt;NOTE: if any item is a view, then the view owner must also have the necessary privileges to execute the view definition. Even if the view owner is a &lt;em&gt;superuser&lt;/em&gt;, they still must explicitly be granted the necessary privileges.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;/ul&gt; &lt;/li&gt; &lt;li&gt;&lt;code&gt;USAGE&lt;/code&gt; privileges on all types used in the query.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;li&gt;&lt;code&gt;USAGE&lt;/code&gt; privileges on the active cluster.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;/ul&gt;   |[m
[32m+[m[32m| &lt;a href="/sql/drop-cluster-replica" &gt;&lt;code&gt;DROP CLUSTER REPLICA&lt;/code&gt;&lt;/a&gt; | &lt;ul&gt; &lt;li&gt;Ownership of the dropped cluster replica.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;li&gt;&lt;code&gt;USAGE&lt;/code&gt; privileges on the containing cluster.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;/ul&gt;   |[m
[32m+[m[32m| &lt;a href="/sql/drop-cluster" &gt;&lt;code&gt;DROP CLUSTER&lt;/code&gt;&lt;/a&gt; | &lt;ul&gt; &lt;li&gt;Ownership of the dropped cluster.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;/ul&gt;   |[m
[32m+[m[32m| &lt;a href="/sql/drop-connection" &gt;&lt;code&gt;DROP CONNECTION&lt;/code&gt;&lt;/a&gt; | &lt;ul&gt; &lt;li&gt;Ownership of the dropped connection.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;li&gt;&lt;code&gt;USAGE&lt;/code&gt; privileges on the containing schema.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;/ul&gt;   |[m
[32m+[m[32m| &lt;a href="/sql/drop-database" &gt;&lt;code&gt;DROP DATABASE&lt;/code&gt;&lt;/a&gt; | &lt;ul&gt; &lt;li&gt;Ownership of the dropped database.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;/ul&gt;   |[m
[32m+[m[32m| &lt;a href="/sql/drop-index" &gt;&lt;code&gt;DROP INDEX&lt;/code&gt;&lt;/a&gt; | &lt;ul&gt; &lt;li&gt;Ownership of the dropped index.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;li&gt;&lt;code&gt;USAGE&lt;/code&gt; privileges on the containing schema.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;/ul&gt;   |[m
[32m+[m[32m| &lt;a href="/sql/drop-materialized-view" &gt;&lt;code&gt;DROP MATERIALIZED VIEW&lt;/code&gt;&lt;/a&gt; | &lt;ul&gt; &lt;li&gt;Ownership of the dropped materialized view.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;li&gt;&lt;code&gt;USAGE&lt;/code&gt; privileges on the containing schema.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;/ul&gt;   |[m
[32m+[m[32m| &lt;a href="/sql/drop-network-policy" &gt;&lt;code&gt;DROP NETWORK POLICY&lt;/code&gt;&lt;/a&gt; | &lt;ul&gt; &lt;li&gt;&lt;code&gt;CREATENETWORKPOLICY&lt;/code&gt; privileges on the system.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;/ul&gt;   |[m
[32m+[m[32m| &lt;a href="/sql/drop-owned" &gt;&lt;code&gt;DROP OWNED&lt;/code&gt;&lt;/a&gt; | &lt;ul&gt; &lt;li&gt;Role membership in &lt;code&gt;role_name&lt;/code&gt;.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;/ul&gt;   |[m
[32m+[m[32m| &lt;a href="/sql/drop-role" &gt;&lt;code&gt;DROP ROLE&lt;/code&gt;&lt;/a&gt; | &lt;ul&gt; &lt;li&gt;&lt;code&gt;CREATEROLE&lt;/code&gt; privileges on the system.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;/ul&gt;   |[m
[32m+[m[32m| &lt;a href="/sql/drop-schema" &gt;&lt;code&gt;DROP SCHEMA&lt;/code&gt;&lt;/a&gt; | &lt;ul&gt; &lt;li&gt;Ownership of the dropped schema.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;li&gt;&lt;code&gt;USAGE&lt;/code&gt; privileges on the containing database.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;/ul&gt;   |[m
[32m+[m[32m| &lt;a href="/sql/drop-secret" &gt;&lt;code&gt;DROP SECRET&lt;/code&gt;&lt;/a&gt; | &lt;ul&gt; &lt;li&gt;Ownership of the dropped secret.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;li&gt;&lt;code&gt;USAGE&lt;/code&gt; privileges on the containing schema.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;/ul&gt;   |[m
[32m+[m[32m| &lt;a href="/sql/drop-sink" &gt;&lt;code&gt;DROP SINK&lt;/code&gt;&lt;/a&gt; | &lt;ul&gt; &lt;li&gt;Ownership of the dropped sink.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;li&gt;&lt;code&gt;USAGE&lt;/code&gt; privileges on the containing schema.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;/ul&gt;   |[m
[32m+[m[32m| &lt;a href="/sql/drop-source" &gt;&lt;code&gt;DROP SOURCE&lt;/code&gt;&lt;/a&gt; | &lt;ul&gt; &lt;li&gt;Ownership of the dropped source.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;li&gt;&lt;code&gt;USAGE&lt;/code&gt; privileges on the containing schema.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;/ul&gt;   |[m
[32m+[m[32m| &lt;a href="/sql/drop-table" &gt;&lt;code&gt;DROP TABLE&lt;/code&gt;&lt;/a&gt; | &lt;ul&gt; &lt;li&gt;Ownership of the dropped table.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;li&gt;&lt;code&gt;USAGE&lt;/code&gt; privileges on the containing schema.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;/ul&gt;   |[m
[32m+[m[32m| &lt;a href="/sql/drop-type" &gt;&lt;code&gt;DROP TYPE&lt;/code&gt;&lt;/a&gt; | &lt;ul&gt; &lt;li&gt;Ownership of the dropped type.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;li&gt;&lt;code&gt;USAGE&lt;/code&gt; privileges on the containing schema.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;/ul&gt;   |[m
[32m+[m[32m| &lt;a href="/sql/drop-user" &gt;&lt;code&gt;DROP USER&lt;/code&gt;&lt;/a&gt; | &lt;ul&gt; &lt;li&gt;&lt;code&gt;CREATEROLE&lt;/code&gt; privileges on the system.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;/ul&gt;   |[m
[32m+[m[32m| &lt;a href="/sql/drop-view" &gt;&lt;code&gt;DROP VIEW&lt;/code&gt;&lt;/a&gt; | &lt;ul&gt; &lt;li&gt;Ownership of the dropped view.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;li&gt;&lt;code&gt;USAGE&lt;/code&gt; privileges on the containing schema.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;/ul&gt;   |[m
[32m+[m[32m| &lt;a href="/sql/explain-analyze" &gt;&lt;code&gt;EXPLAIN ANALYZE&lt;/code&gt;&lt;/a&gt; | &lt;ul&gt; &lt;li&gt;&lt;code&gt;USAGE&lt;/code&gt; privileges on the schemas that all relations in the explainee are contained in.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;/ul&gt;   |[m
[32m+[m[32m| &lt;a href="/sql/explain-filter-pushdown" &gt;&lt;code&gt;EXPLAIN FILTER PUSHDOWN&lt;/code&gt;&lt;/a&gt; | &lt;ul&gt; &lt;li&gt;&lt;code&gt;USAGE&lt;/code&gt; privileges on the schemas that all relations in the explainee are contained in.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;/ul&gt;   |[m
[32m+[m[32m| &lt;a href="/sql/explain-plan" &gt;&lt;code&gt;EXPLAIN PLAN&lt;/code&gt;&lt;/a&gt; | &lt;ul&gt; &lt;li&gt;&lt;code&gt;USAGE&lt;/code&gt; privileges on the schemas that all relations in the explainee are contained in.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;/ul&gt;   |[m
[32m+[m[32m| &lt;a href="/sql/explain-schema" &gt;&lt;code&gt;EXPLAIN SCHEMA&lt;/code&gt;&lt;/a&gt; | &lt;ul&gt; &lt;li&gt;&lt;code&gt;USAGE&lt;/code&gt; privileges on the schemas that all items in the query are contained in.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;/ul&gt;   |[m
[32m+[m[32m| &lt;a href="/sql/explain-timestamp" &gt;&lt;code&gt;EXPLAIN TIMESTAMP&lt;/code&gt;&lt;/a&gt; | &lt;ul&gt; &lt;li&gt;&lt;code&gt;USAGE&lt;/code&gt; privileges on the schemas that all relations in the query are contained in.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;/ul&gt;   |[m
[32m+[m[32m| &lt;a href="/sql/grant-privilege" &gt;&lt;code&gt;GRANT PRIVILEGE&lt;/code&gt;&lt;/a&gt; | &lt;ul&gt; &lt;li&gt;Ownership of affected objects.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;li&gt;&lt;code&gt;USAGE&lt;/code&gt; privileges on the containing database if the affected object is a schema.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;li&gt;&lt;code&gt;USAGE&lt;/code&gt; privileges on the containing schema if the affected object is namespaced by a schema.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;li&gt;&lt;em&gt;superuser&lt;/em&gt; status if the privilege is a system privilege.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;/ul&gt;   |[m
[32m+[m[32m| &lt;a href="/sql/grant-role" &gt;&lt;code&gt;GRANT ROLE&lt;/code&gt;&lt;/a&gt; | &lt;ul&gt; &lt;li&gt;&lt;code&gt;CREATEROLE&lt;/code&gt; privileges on the system.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;/ul&gt;   |[m
[32m+[m[32m| &lt;a href="/sql/insert" &gt;&lt;code&gt;INSERT&lt;/code&gt;&lt;/a&gt; | &lt;ul&gt; &lt;li&gt;&lt;code&gt;USAGE&lt;/code&gt; privileges on the schemas that all relations and types in the query are contained in.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;li&gt;&lt;code&gt;INSERT&lt;/code&gt; privileges on &lt;code&gt;table_name&lt;/code&gt;.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;li&gt;&lt;code&gt;SELECT&lt;/code&gt; privileges on all relations in the query. &lt;ul&gt; &lt;li&gt;NOTE: if any item is a view, then the view owner must also have the necessary privileges to execute the view definition. Even if the view owner is a &lt;em&gt;superuser&lt;/em&gt;, they still must explicitly be granted the necessary privileges.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;/ul&gt; &lt;/li&gt; &lt;li&gt;&lt;code&gt;USAGE&lt;/code&gt; privileges on all types used in the query.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;li&gt;&lt;code&gt;USAGE&lt;/code&gt; privileges on the active cluster.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;/ul&gt;   |[m
[32m+[m[32m| &lt;a href="/sql/reassign-owned" &gt;&lt;code&gt;REASSIGN OWNED&lt;/code&gt;&lt;/a&gt; | &lt;ul&gt; &lt;li&gt;Role membership in &lt;code&gt;old_role&lt;/code&gt; and &lt;code&gt;new_role&lt;/code&gt;.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;/ul&gt;   |[m
[32m+[m[32m| &lt;a href="/sql/revoke-privilege" &gt;&lt;code&gt;REVOKE PRIVILEGE&lt;/code&gt;&lt;/a&gt; | &lt;ul&gt; &lt;li&gt;Ownership of affected objects.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;li&gt;&lt;code&gt;USAGE&lt;/code&gt; privileges on the containing database if the affected object is a schema.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;li&gt;&lt;code&gt;USAGE&lt;/code&gt; privileges on the containing schema if the affected object is namespaced by a schema.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;li&gt;&lt;em&gt;superuser&lt;/em&gt; status if the privilege is a system privilege.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;/ul&gt;   |[m
[32m+[m[32m| &lt;a href="/sql/revoke-role" &gt;&lt;code&gt;REVOKE ROLE&lt;/code&gt;&lt;/a&gt; | &lt;ul&gt; &lt;li&gt;&lt;code&gt;CREATEROLE&lt;/code&gt; privileges on the systems.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;/ul&gt;   |[m
[32m+[m[32m| &lt;a href="/sql/select" &gt;&lt;code&gt;SELECT&lt;/code&gt;&lt;/a&gt; | &lt;ul&gt; &lt;li&gt; &lt;p&gt;&lt;code&gt;SELECT&lt;/code&gt; privileges on all &lt;strong&gt;directly&lt;/strong&gt; referenced relations in the query. If the directly referenced relation is a view or materialized view: &lt;/p&gt; &lt;/li&gt; &lt;li&gt; &lt;p&gt;&lt;code&gt;USAGE&lt;/code&gt; privileges on the schemas that contain the relations in the query.&lt;/p&gt; &lt;/li&gt; &lt;li&gt; &lt;p&gt;&lt;code&gt;USAGE&lt;/code&gt; privileges on the active cluster.&lt;/p&gt; &lt;/li&gt; &lt;/ul&gt;   |[m
[32m+[m[32m| &lt;a href="/sql/show-columns" &gt;&lt;code&gt;SHOW COLUMNS&lt;/code&gt;&lt;/a&gt; | &lt;ul&gt; &lt;li&gt;&lt;code&gt;USAGE&lt;/code&gt; privileges on the schema containing &lt;code&gt;item_ref&lt;/code&gt;.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;/ul&gt;   |[m
[32m+[m[32m| &lt;a href="/sql/show-create-cluster" &gt;&lt;code&gt;SHOW CREATE CLUSTER&lt;/code&gt;&lt;/a&gt; | There are no privileges required to execute this statement.  |[m
[32m+[m[32m| &lt;a href="/sql/show-create-connection" &gt;&lt;code&gt;SHOW CREATE CONNECTION&lt;/code&gt;&lt;/a&gt; | &lt;ul&gt; &lt;li&gt;&lt;code&gt;USAGE&lt;/code&gt; privileges on the schema containing the connection.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;/ul&gt;   |[m
[32m+[m[32m| &lt;a href="/sql/show-create-index" &gt;&lt;code&gt;SHOW CREATE INDEX&lt;/code&gt;&lt;/a&gt; | &lt;ul&gt; &lt;li&gt;&lt;code&gt;USAGE&lt;/code&gt; privileges on the schema containing the index.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;/ul&gt;   |[m
[32m+[m[32m| &lt;a href="/sql/show-create-materialized-view" &gt;&lt;code&gt;SHOW CREATE MATERIALIZED VIEW&lt;/code&gt;&lt;/a&gt; | &lt;ul&gt; &lt;li&gt;&lt;code&gt;USAGE&lt;/code&gt; privileges on the schema containing the materialized view.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;/ul&gt;   |[m
[32m+[m[32m| &lt;a href="/sql/show-create-type" &gt;&lt;code&gt;SHOW CREATE TYPE&lt;/code&gt;&lt;/a&gt; | &lt;ul&gt; &lt;li&gt;&lt;code&gt;USAGE&lt;/code&gt; privileges on the schema containing the table.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;/ul&gt;   |[m
[32m+[m[32m| &lt;a href="/sql/show-create-sink" &gt;&lt;code&gt;SHOW CREATE SINK&lt;/code&gt;&lt;/a&gt; | &lt;ul&gt; &lt;li&gt;&lt;code&gt;USAGE&lt;/code&gt; privileges on the schema containing the sink.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;/ul&gt;   |[m
[32m+[m[32m| &lt;a href="/sql/show-create-source" &gt;&lt;code&gt;SHOW CREATE SOURCE&lt;/code&gt;&lt;/a&gt; | &lt;ul&gt; &lt;li&gt;&lt;code&gt;USAGE&lt;/code&gt; privileges on the schema containing the source.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;/ul&gt;   |[m
[32m+[m[32m| &lt;a href="/sql/show-create-table" &gt;&lt;code&gt;SHOW CREATE TABLE&lt;/code&gt;&lt;/a&gt; | &lt;ul&gt; &lt;li&gt;&lt;code&gt;USAGE&lt;/code&gt; privileges on the schema containing the table.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;/ul&gt;   |[m
[32m+[m[32m| &lt;a href="/sql/show-create-view" &gt;&lt;code&gt;SHOW CREATE VIEW&lt;/code&gt;&lt;/a&gt; | &lt;ul&gt; &lt;li&gt;&lt;code&gt;USAGE&lt;/code&gt; privileges on the schema containing the view.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;/ul&gt;   |[m
[32m+[m[32m| &lt;a href="/sql/subscribe" &gt;&lt;code&gt;SUBSCRIBE&lt;/code&gt;&lt;/a&gt; | &lt;ul&gt; &lt;li&gt;&lt;code&gt;USAGE&lt;/code&gt; privileges on the schemas that all relations and types in the query are contained in.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;li&gt;&lt;code&gt;SELECT&lt;/code&gt; privileges on all relations in the query. &lt;ul&gt; &lt;li&gt;NOTE: if any item is a view, then the view owner must also have the necessary privileges to execute the view definition. Even if the view owner is a &lt;em&gt;superuser&lt;/em&gt;, they still must explicitly be granted the necessary privileges.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;/ul&gt; &lt;/li&gt; &lt;li&gt;&lt;code&gt;USAGE&lt;/code&gt; privileges on all types used in the query.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;li&gt;&lt;code&gt;USAGE&lt;/code&gt; privileges on the active cluster.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;/ul&gt;   |[m
[32m+[m[32m| &lt;a href="/sql/update" &gt;&lt;code&gt;UPDATE&lt;/code&gt;&lt;/a&gt; | &lt;ul&gt; &lt;li&gt;&lt;code&gt;USAGE&lt;/code&gt; privileges on the schemas that all relations and types in the query are contained in.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;li&gt;&lt;code&gt;UPDATE&lt;/code&gt; privileges on the table being updated.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;li&gt;&lt;code&gt;SELECT&lt;/code&gt; privileges on all relations in the query. &lt;ul&gt; &lt;li&gt;NOTE: if any item is a view, then the view owner must also have the necessary privileges to execute the view definition. Even if the view owner is a &lt;em&gt;superuser&lt;/em&gt;, they still must explicitly be granted the necessary privileges.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;/ul&gt; &lt;/li&gt; &lt;li&gt;&lt;code&gt;USAGE&lt;/code&gt; privileges on all types used in the query.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;li&gt;&lt;code&gt;USAGE&lt;/code&gt; privileges on the active cluster.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;/ul&gt;   |[m
[32m+[m[32m| &lt;a href="/sql/validate-connection" &gt;&lt;code&gt;VALIDATE CONNECTION&lt;/code&gt;&lt;/a&gt; | &lt;ul&gt; &lt;li&gt;&lt;code&gt;USAGE&lt;/code&gt; privileges on the containing schema.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;li&gt;&lt;code&gt;USAGE&lt;/code&gt; privileges on the connection.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;/ul&gt;   |[m
[33mdiff --git a/doc/user/static/markdown-docs/security/cloud/access-control/index.md b/doc/user/static/markdown-docs/security/cloud/access-control/index.md[m
[33mindex 36868e42f3..406ebd8b7b 100644[m
[33m--- a/doc/user/static/markdown-docs/security/cloud/access-control/index.md[m
[33m+++ b/doc/user/static/markdown-docs/security/cloud/access-control/index.md[m
[35m@@ -4,7 +4,7 @@[m [mHow to configure and manage role-based database access control (RBAC) in Materia[m
 [m
 [m
 [m
[31m-&gt; **Disambiguation:** Materialize uses roles to manage access control at two levels: - [Organization roles](/security/cloud/users-service-accounts/#organization-roles), which determines the access to the Console's administrative features and sets the **initial database roles** for the user/service account. - [Database roles](/security/cloud/access-control/#role-based-access-control-rbac), which controls access to database objects and operations within Materialize. This section focuses on the database access control. For information on organization roles, see [Users and service accounts](../users-service-accounts/).[m
[32m+[m[32m&gt; **Disambiguation:** This section focuses on the database access control. For information on organization roles, see [Users and service accounts](../users-service-accounts/).[m
 [m
 [m
 [m
[35m@@ -17,74 +17,110 @@[m [mroles](./manage-roles/).[m
 [m
 ## Roles and privileges[m
 [m
[31m-In Materialize, a database role is created:[m
[31m-- Automatically when a user/service account is created:[m
[31m-  - When a [user account is[m
[31m-  created](/security/cloud/users-service-accounts/invite-users/), an associated[m
[31m-  database role with the user email as its name is created.[m
[31m-  - When a [service account is[m
[31m-  created](/security/cloud/users-service-accounts/create-service-accounts/), an[m
[31m-  associated database role with the service account user as its name is created.[m
[31m-- Manually to create a role independent of any specific account,[m
[31m-  usually to define a set of shared privileges that can be granted to other[m
[31m-  user/service/standalone roles.[m
[32m+[m[32m&lt;p&gt;In Materialize, a database role is created:&lt;/p&gt;[m
[32m+[m[32m&lt;ul&gt;[m
[32m+[m[32m&lt;li&gt;Automatically when a user/service account is created:[m
[32m+[m[32m&lt;ul&gt;[m
[32m+[m[32m&lt;li&gt;When a &lt;a href="/security/cloud/users-service-accounts/invite-users/" &gt;user account is[m
[32m+[m[32mcreated&lt;/a&gt;, an associated[m
[32m+[m[32mdatabase role with the user email as its name is created.&lt;/li&gt;[m
[32m+[m[32m&lt;li&gt;When a &lt;a href="/security/cloud/users-service-accounts/create-service-accounts/" &gt;service account is[m
[32m+[m[32mcreated&lt;/a&gt;, an[m
[32m+[m[32massociated database role with the service account user as its name is created.&lt;/li&gt;[m
[32m+[m[32m&lt;/ul&gt;[m
[32m+[m[32m&lt;/li&gt;[m
[32m+[m[32m&lt;li&gt;Manually to create a role independent of any specific account,[m
[32m+[m[32musually to define a set of shared privileges that can be granted to other[m
[32m+[m[32muser/service/standalone roles.&lt;/li&gt;[m
[32m+[m[32m&lt;/ul&gt;[m
 [m
 ### Managing privileges[m
 [m
[31m-Once a role is created, you can:[m
[31m-[m
[31m-- [Manage its current[m
[31m-  privileges](/security/cloud/access-control/manage-roles/#manage-current-privileges-for-a-role)[m
[31m-  (i.e., privileges on existing objects):[m
[31m-  - By granting privileges for a role or revoking privileges from a role.[m
[31m-  - By granting other roles to the role or revoking roles from the role.[m
[31m-    *Recommended for user account/service account roles.*[m
[31m-- [Manage its future[m
[31m-  privileges](/security/cloud/access-control/manage-roles/#manage-future-privileges-for-a-role)[m
[31m-  (i.e., privileges on objects created in the future):[m
[31m-  - By defining default privileges for objects. With default privileges in[m
[31m-   place, a role is automatically granted/revoked privileges as new objects are[m
[31m-   created by **others** (When an object is created, the creator is granted all[m
[31m-   [applicable privileges](/security/appendix/appendix-privileges/) for that[m
[31m-   object automatically).[m
[31m-[m
[31m-&gt; **Disambiguation:** - Use &#96;GRANT|REVOKE ...&#96; to modify privileges on **existing** objects. - Use &#96;ALTER DEFAULT PRIVILEGES&#96; to ensure that privileges are automatically granted or revoked when **new objects** of a certain type are created by others. Then, as needed, you can use &#96;GRANT|REVOKE &lt;privilege&gt;&#96; to adjust those privileges.[m
[32m+[m[32m&lt;p&gt;Once a role is created, you can:&lt;/p&gt;[m
[32m+[m[32m&lt;ul&gt;[m
[32m+[m[32m&lt;li&gt;&lt;a href="/security/cloud/access-control/manage-roles/#manage-current-privileges-for-a-role" &gt;Manage its current[m
[32m+[m[32mprivileges&lt;/a&gt;[m
[32m+[m[32m(i.e., privileges on existing objects):[m
[32m+[m[32m&lt;ul&gt;[m
[32m+[m[32m&lt;li&gt;By granting privileges for a role or revoking privileges from a role.&lt;/li&gt;[m
[32m+[m[32m&lt;li&gt;By granting other roles to the role or revoking roles from the role.[m
[32m+[m[32m&lt;em&gt;Recommended for user account/service account roles.&lt;/em&gt;&lt;/li&gt;[m
[32m+[m[32m&lt;/ul&gt;[m
[32m+[m[32m&lt;/li&gt;[m
[32m+[m[32m&lt;li&gt;&lt;a href="/security/cloud/access-control/manage-roles/#manage-future-privileges-for-a-role" &gt;Manage its future[m
[32m+[m[32mprivileges&lt;/a&gt;[m
[32m+[m[32m(i.e., privileges on objects created in the future):[m
[32m+[m[32m&lt;ul&gt;[m
[32m+[m[32m&lt;li&gt;By defining default privileges for objects. With default privileges in[m
[32m+[m[32mplace, a role is automatically granted/revoked privileges as new objects are[m
[32m+[m[32mcreated by &lt;strong&gt;others&lt;/strong&gt; (When an object is created, the creator is granted all[m
[32m+[m[32m&lt;a href="/security/appendix/appendix-privileges/" &gt;applicable privileges&lt;/a&gt; for that[m
[32m+[m[32mobject automatically).&lt;/li&gt;[m
[32m+[m[32m&lt;/ul&gt;[m
[32m+[m[32m&lt;/li&gt;[m
[32m+[m[32m&lt;/ul&gt;[m
[32m+[m
[32m+[m[32m&gt; **Disambiguation:** &lt;ul&gt; &lt;li&gt; &lt;p&gt;Use &lt;code&gt;GRANT|REVOKE ...&lt;/code&gt; to modify privileges on &lt;strong&gt;existing&lt;/strong&gt; objects.&lt;/p&gt; &lt;/li&gt; &lt;li&gt; &lt;p&gt;Use &lt;code&gt;ALTER DEFAULT PRIVILEGES&lt;/code&gt; to ensure that privileges are automatically granted or revoked when &lt;strong&gt;new objects&lt;/strong&gt; of a certain type are created by others. Then, as needed, you can use &lt;code&gt;GRANT|REVOKE &amp;lt;privilege&amp;gt;&lt;/code&gt; to adjust those privileges.&lt;/p&gt; &lt;/li&gt; &lt;/ul&gt;[m
 [m
 [m
 ### Initial privileges[m
 [m
[31m-All roles in Materialize are automatically members of[m
[31m-[&#96;PUBLIC&#96;](/security/appendix/appendix-built-in-roles/#public-role). As[m
[31m-such, every role includes inherited privileges from &#96;PUBLIC&#96;.[m
[31m-[m
[31m-By default, the &#96;PUBLIC&#96; role has the following privileges:[m
[31m-[m
[31m-[m
[31m-**Baseline privileges via PUBLIC role:**[m
[31m-[m
[31m-| Privilege | Description | On database object(s) |[m
[31m-| --- | --- | --- |[m
[31m-| &lt;code&gt;USAGE&lt;/code&gt; | Permission to use or reference an object. | &lt;ul&gt; &lt;li&gt;All &lt;code&gt;*.public&lt;/code&gt; schemas (e.g., &lt;code&gt;materialize.public&lt;/code&gt;);&lt;/li&gt; &lt;li&gt;&lt;code&gt;materialize&lt;/code&gt; database; and&lt;/li&gt; &lt;li&gt;&lt;code&gt;quickstart&lt;/code&gt; cluster.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;/ul&gt;  |[m
[31m-[m
[31m-[m
[31m-**Default privileges on future objects set up for PUBLIC:**[m
[31m-[m
[31m-| Object(s) | Object owner | Default Privilege | Granted to | Description |[m
[31m-| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |[m
[31m-| &lt;a href="/sql/types/" &gt;&lt;code&gt;TYPE&lt;/code&gt;&lt;/a&gt; | &lt;code&gt;PUBLIC&lt;/code&gt; | &lt;code&gt;USAGE&lt;/code&gt; | &lt;code&gt;PUBLIC&lt;/code&gt; | When a &lt;a href="/sql/types/" &gt;data type&lt;/a&gt; is created (regardless of the owner), all roles are granted the &lt;code&gt;USAGE&lt;/code&gt; privilege. However, to use a data type, the role must also have &lt;code&gt;USAGE&lt;/code&gt; privilege on the schema containing the type. |[m
[31m-[m
[31m-Default privileges apply only to objects created after these privileges are[m
[32m+[m[32m&lt;p&gt;All roles in Materialize are automatically members of[m
[32m+[m[32m&lt;a href="/security/appendix/appendix-built-in-roles/#public-role" &gt;&lt;code&gt;PUBLIC&lt;/code&gt;&lt;/a&gt;. As[m
[32m+[m[32msuch, every role includes inherited privileges from &lt;code&gt;PUBLIC&lt;/code&gt;.&lt;/p&gt;[m
[32m+[m[32m&lt;p&gt;By default, the &lt;code&gt;PUBLIC&lt;/code&gt; role has the following privileges:&lt;/p&gt;[m
[32m+[m[32m&lt;p&gt;&lt;strong&gt;Baseline privileges via PUBLIC role:&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/p&gt;[m
[32m+[m[32m&lt;table&gt;[m
[32m+[m[32m&lt;thead&gt;[m
[32m+[m[32m&lt;tr&gt;[m
[32m+[m[32m&lt;th&gt;Privilege&lt;/th&gt;[m
[32m+[m[32m&lt;th&gt;Description&lt;/th&gt;[m
[32m+[m[32m&lt;th&gt;On database object(s)&lt;/th&gt;[m
[32m+[m[32m&lt;/tr&gt;[m
[32m+[m[32m&lt;/thead&gt;[m
[32m+[m[32m&lt;tbody&gt;[m
[32m+[m[32m&lt;tr&gt;[m
[32m+[m[32m&lt;td&gt;&lt;code&gt;USAGE&lt;/code&gt;&lt;/td&gt;[m
[32m+[m[32m&lt;td&gt;Permission to use or reference an object.&lt;/td&gt;[m
[32m+[m[32m&lt;td&gt;&lt;ul&gt; &lt;li&gt;All &lt;code&gt;*.public&lt;/code&gt; schemas (e.g., &lt;code&gt;materialize.public&lt;/code&gt;);&lt;/li&gt; &lt;li&gt;&lt;code&gt;materialize&lt;/code&gt; database; and&lt;/li&gt; &lt;li&gt;&lt;code&gt;quickstart&lt;/code&gt; cluster.&lt;/li&gt; &lt;/ul&gt;&lt;/td&gt;[m
[32m+[m[32m&lt;/tr&gt;[m
[32m+[m[32m&lt;/tbody&gt;[m
[32m+[m[32m&lt;/table&gt;[m
[32m+[m[32m&lt;p&gt;&lt;strong&gt;Default privileges on future objects set up for PUBLIC:&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/p&gt;[m
[32m+[m[32m&lt;table&gt;[m
[32m+[m[32m&lt;thead&gt;[m
[32m+[m[32m&lt;tr&gt;[m
[32m+[m[32m&lt;th&gt;Object(s)&lt;/th&gt;[m
[32m+[m[32m&lt;th&gt;Object owner&lt;/th&gt;[m
[32m+[m[32m&lt;th&gt;Default Privilege&lt;/th&gt;[m
[32m+[m[32m&lt;th&gt;Granted to&lt;/th&gt;[m
[32m+[m[32m&lt;th&gt;Description&lt;/th&gt;[m
[32m+[m[32m&lt;/tr&gt;[m
[32m+[m[32m&lt;/thead&gt;[m
[32m+[m[32m&lt;tbody&gt;[m
[32m+[m[32m&lt;tr&gt;[m
[32m+[m[32m&lt;td&gt;&lt;a href="/sql/types/" &gt;&lt;code&gt;TYPE&lt;/code&gt;&lt;/a&gt;&lt;/td&gt;[m
[32m+[m[32m&lt;td&gt;&lt;code&gt;PUBLIC&lt;/code&gt;&lt;/td&gt;[m
[32m+[m[32m&lt;td&gt;&lt;code&gt;USAGE&lt;/code&gt;&lt;/td&gt;[m
[32m+[m[32m&lt;td&gt;&lt;code&gt;PUBLIC&lt;/code&gt;&lt;/td&gt;[m
[32m+[m[32m&lt;td&gt;When a &lt;a href="/sql/types/" &gt;data type&lt;/a&gt; is created (regardless of the owner), all roles are granted the &lt;code&gt;USAGE&lt;/code&gt; privilege. However, to use a data type, the role must also have &lt;code&gt;USAGE&lt;/code&gt; privilege on the schema containing the type.&lt;/td&gt;[m
[32m+[m[32m&lt;/tr&gt;[m
[32m+[m[32m&lt;/tbody&gt;[m
[32m+[m[32m&lt;/table&gt;[m
[32m+[m[32m&lt;p&gt;Default privileges apply only to objects created after these privileges are[m
 defined. They do not affect objects that were created before the default[m
[31m-privileges were set.[m
[32m+[m[32mprivileges were set.&lt;/p&gt;[m
[32m+[m[32m&lt;p&gt;In addition, all roles have:&lt;/p&gt;[m
[32m+[m[32m&lt;ul&gt;[m
[32m+[m[32m&lt;li&gt;&lt;code&gt;USAGE&lt;/code&gt; on all built-in types and &lt;a href="/sql/system-catalog/" &gt;all system catalog[m
[32m+[m[32mschemas&lt;/a&gt;.&lt;/li&gt;[m
[32m+[m[32m&lt;li&gt;&lt;code&gt;SELECT&lt;/code&gt; on &lt;a href="/sql/system-catalog/" &gt;system catalog objects&lt;/a&gt;.&lt;/li&gt;[m
[32m+[m[32m&lt;li&gt;All &lt;a href="/security/appendix/appendix-privileges/" &gt;applicable privileges&lt;/a&gt; for[m
[32m+[m[32man object they create; for example, the creator of a schema gets &lt;code&gt;CREATE&lt;/code&gt; and[m
[32m+[m[32m&lt;code&gt;USAGE&lt;/code&gt;; the creator of a table gets &lt;code&gt;SELECT&lt;/code&gt;, &lt;code&gt;INSERT&lt;/code&gt;, &lt;code&gt;UPDATE&lt;/code&gt;, and[m
[32m+[m[32m&lt;code&gt;DELETE&lt;/code&gt;.&lt;/li&gt;[m
[32m+[m[32m&lt;/ul&gt;[m
 [m
[31m-In addition, all roles have:[m
[31m-- &#96;USAGE&#96; on all built-in types and [all system catalog[m
[31m-schemas](/sql/system-catalog/).[m
[31m-- &#96;SELECT&#96; on [system catalog objects](/sql/system-catalog/).[m
[31m-- All [applicable privileges](/security/appendix/appendix-privileges/) for[m
[31m-  an object they create; for example, the creator of a schema gets &#96;CREATE&#96; and[m
[31m-  &#96;USAGE&#96;; the creator of a table gets &#96;SELECT&#96;, &#96;INSERT&#96;, &#96;UPDATE&#96;, and[m
[31m-  &#96;DELETE&#96;.[m
 [m
 You can modify the privileges of your organization's &#96;PUBLIC&#96; role as well as[m
 the modify default privileges for &#96;PUBLIC&#96;.[m
[35m@@ -108,7 +144,7 @@[m [mcombining existing roles, enabling modular access control. However:[m
   are not inherited.[m
 - When you revoke a role from another role (user role/service account[m
 role/independent role), the target role is no longer a member of the revoked[m
[31m-role nor inherits the revoked role's privileges. **However**, privileges are[m
[32m+[m[32mrole nor inherits the revoked role&amp;rsquo;s privileges. &lt;strong&gt;However&lt;/strong&gt;, privileges are[m
 cumulative: if the target role inherits the same privilege(s) from another role,[m
 the target role still has the privilege(s) through the other role.[m

 [m

[31m-{{% include-headless "/headless/rbac-cloud/use-resusable-roles" %}}[m

 [m
 See also [Manage database roles](/security/access-control/manage-roles/).[m
